headline: Newmont Stock Slides 16% in 3 Months: Here's How to Play the Stock
summary: NEM shares have fallen 16% in three months as gold prices weakened, but growth projects, strong cash flow and buybacks shape the long-term outlook.

headline: Xali Gold Strengthens Technical Team at Pico Machay
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Xali Gold Corp. (TSXV:XGC) (“Xali Gold” or the “Company”) is pleased to announce the appointment of Ing. Wilder Frank Garcia Haro as Exploration Manager, effective immediately. Ing. Garcia is a bilingual geological engineer with more than 30 years of international exploration and mine development experience, having held senior technical and management positions with several leading mining companies, including Rio Alto, Tahoe Resource

headline: Goldstorm Metals Commences Phase 1 Drill Program at the Crown Project, British Columbia
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - July 15, 2026) - Goldstorm Metals Corp. (TSXV: GSTM) (FSE: B2U) ("Goldstorm" or "the Company") is pleased to report that a diamond drill program has commenced (the "Program") on its 100% owned Crown copper-gold-silver property (the "Property"), located within the Golden Triangle region of British Columbia. Crown is situated to the south of Newmont Corporation's Brucejack Mine and Seabridge Gold Inc.'s KSM Property, an area host to over 80 million...

headline: These 10 Stocks Rallied as Producer Inflation Plunged: Here's Why
summary: PPI fell 0.3% in June, the softest since April 2025. Gold miners, BlackRock and Bank of Nova Scotia topped the large-cap pre-market board. Here's why.
